name_en: 🆕 Chip Version.💕 Top Quality Replica M83381 Blue. This Zippy Vertical wallet is crafted from Monogram Shadow embossed calfskin, giving a modern feel to its full-zip structure. Multiple card slots, pockets, and a zip coin pocket offer practical functionality. 10 x 20 x 2 cm (Length x Height x Width)
